Table summary. File name: docs/document-inventory.md. Type of document: Inventory / project control. Purpose: Track source and draft documents in the repository.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who owns keeping this inventory current?. File name: docs/project-dashboard.md. Type of document: Project dashboard. Purpose: Track major documents by purpose, owner, status, reviewer, priority, and notes.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, project lead. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who owns dashboard updates after committee meetings?. File name: docs/00-project-brief.md. Type of document: Project brief. Purpose: Explain the Treasurer transition, deeper operations issue, and desired future state.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Should this remain a project brief or become a short manual introduction?. File name: docs/01-current-state-assessment.md. Type of document: Assessment. Purpose: Organize current problems by role clarity, committee ownership, manual processes, software, spending, budget, and documentation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which observations should be validated by Finance Committee before being used publicly?. File name: docs/02-decision-log.md. Type of document: Decision log. Purpose: Record project decisions, owners, status, and notes.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who is responsible for updating decisions after meetings?. File name: docs/03-open-questions.md. Type of document: Open questions tracker. Purpose: Track questions for Personnel, Finance, Nominating, Deacons, Pastor, Congregation, and professional review.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: All project reviewers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Which questions must be answered before any church vote?. File name: docs/implementation-roadmap.md. Type of document: Implementation roadmap. Purpose: Organize stabilization, 30-day, 60-day, 90-day, and long-term Operations Manual integration work.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who owns roadmap updates and phase completion tracking?. File name: docs/document-workflow-upgrade-notes.md. Type of document: Workflow review note. Purpose: Capture useful patterns and upgrade opportunities from the prior KBC Personnel Committee repository.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, document maintainers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Which workflow improvements should be implemented next, especially Windows-friendly local export?. File name: docs/governance/constitution-and-bylaws-reference.md. Type of document: Governance reference page. Purpose: Provide site access to the 2018 Constitution, Bylaws, and Covenant source and key financial-operations review questions.. Current status: Reference. Related committee/body: Congregation, Pastor, Deacons, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Is the 2018 PDF the current authoritative version?. File name: docs/governance/finance-committee-charter.md. Type of document: Committee charter. Purpose: Define Finance Committee purpose, responsibilities, meeting cadence, monthly review, software ownership, and reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Does this match KBC bylaws and current committee authority?. File name: docs/governance/personnel-committee-role.md. Type of document: Committee role clarification. Purpose: Clarify Personnel Committee role in finance-related staffing, job descriptions, accountability, and evaluations.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Should this live in a broader personnel manual instead of the financial operations manual?. File name: docs/governance/responsibility-matrix.md. Type of document: Responsibility matrix.
